title: Ordinance Approving and Adopting the Mtpfrb Resolution No. 2020-04 Dated January 17, 2020, Entitled "resolution Approving the One Thousand Six Hundred Eighty-nine (1,689) Units of Motorized Tricycles with Valid Franchises As the Legal and Authorized Number of Motorized Units That Can Operate in the Municipality of Los Baños."
